title: acacia pruinosa
intro: Acacia pruinosa, also known as the hairy cat's claw or cat's claw acacia, is a species of thorny shrub or small tree native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Acacia pruinosa include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Acacia pruinosa is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its roots, bark, and leaves are used in herbal preparations to harness its medicinal properties.
